data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement of providers submitting bids.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation that providers can submit bids, including price and availability. However, the evidence provided does not include any explicit API reads or checks confirming that providers have submitted bids. The linked use case describes a scenario where bids are made, but there is no evidence of an actual API interaction or state check that confirms this requirement is met.
gaps: No evidence of providers submitting bids with price and availability.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
